ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "siteID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "siteName" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "environmentType" TEXT /* Type of environment */,
  "climateZone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "siteNotes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the site */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the site record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the site record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the site record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the site record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("siteID")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plotID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "siteID" TEXT /* Reference to the site where the plot is located */,
  "plotDescription" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  "plotArea" REAL /* Area of the plot in square meters */,
  "plotElevation" REAL /* Elevation of the plot */,
  "plotNotes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the plot */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the plot record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the plot record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the plot record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the plot record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plotID")
)

CREATE TABLE "traps" (
  "trapID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trap */,
  "plotID" TEXT /* Reference to the plot where the trap is located */,
  "trapDescription" TEXT /* Description of the trap */,
  "trapType" TEXT /* Type of trap used */,
  "trapMaterial" TEXT /* Material of the trap */,
  "trapSize" TEXT /* Size of the trap */,
  "trapNotes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trap */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the trap record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the trap record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the trap record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the trap record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trapID")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocolVersion" TEXT /* Version identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocolDescription" TEXT /* Description of the sampling protocol */,
  "effectiveDate" TEXT /* Date when the protocol became effective */,
  "protocolType" TEXT /* Type of protocol */,
  "protocolNotes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the protocol */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the protocol record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the protocol record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the protocol record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the protocol record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocolVersion")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_groups" (
  "functionalGroup" TEXT /* Name of the functional group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functional group */,
  "groupNotes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the functional group */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the functional group record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the functional group record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the functional group record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the functional group record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functionalGroup")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "userName" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the sample collection and analysis process */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "roleID" TEXT /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "phoneNumber" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the user record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the user record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roleID FOREIGN KEY ("roleID") REFERENCES roles ("roleID")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_measurements" (
  "uid" TEXT /* Reference to the unique identifier of the sample */,
  "dryMass" REAL /* Dry mass measurement of the sample */,
  "qaDryMass" TEXT /* Quality assurance flag for the dry mass measurement */,
  "measuredBy" TEXT /* Email of the person who measured the sample */,
  "measuredDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurementNotes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the measurement record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the measurement record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_measurements_measuredBy FOREIGN KEY ("measuredBy") REFERENCES users ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "roleID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "roleName" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions for the role */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the role record */,
  "createdDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "lastModifiedBy" TEXT /* Email of the user who last modified the role record */,
  "lastModifiedDate" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roleID")
)
